## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pytest -q` is green
- [ ] Followed TDD (failing test first) for behavior changes
- [ ] Examples are fabricated — no real/internal service names
- [ ] No new hardcoded vendor/tool name in core (config-driven instead)
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` / `test:` / `refactor:` / `chore:`)
